title: Public Repo Release Gate Release
summary: A sanitized real case covering the successful public release of the public-repo-release-gate skill as a standalone GitHub repository.

messages.author: user
messages.summary: User asks to publish the existing public-repo-release-gate skill as a standalone public GitHub repository without carrying private residue.

messages.author: agent
messages.summary: Agent reports the repo was created, validated, pushed to GitHub, and released as v0.1.0.

links.label: public-repo-release-gate
links.summary: Public GitHub repository created for the skill.

artifacts.label: README.md
artifacts.summary: Public-facing README explaining product purpose, installation, usage, checklist, boundaries, and license.

artifacts.label: SKILL.md
artifacts.summary: Agent skill workflow preserved as a public package artifact.

artifacts.label: scripts/public_release_gate.py
artifacts.summary: Static release hygiene checker included with the public repo.

events.title: Release scope is constrained
events.summary: The work is scoped to a standalone public repository and explicitly excludes private sync repos and private workflow residue.

events.title: Public surface is assembled
events.summary: README, license, skill metadata, and checker script are arranged into a public repository shape.

events.title: Repository and release are published
events.summary: The repository is pushed to GitHub and v0.1.0 is cut after validation.

tool_events.summary: The checker ran in final mode and left only one reviewed WARN from intentional examples in SKILL.md.
tool_events.why_it_matters: It proves the public surface was checked for release-blocking residue before publish.

tool_events.summary: Commit 0b3dd36 was pushed to the public repository main branch.
tool_events.why_it_matters: It is the durable publication point for the public repo case.

timeline.title: Public release request lands
timeline.summary: The task defines a standalone public repo with no private sync dependency.

timeline.title: Repository public surface is built
timeline.summary: The repo receives a README, LICENSE, skill file, metadata, checker script, and gitignore.

timeline.title: Release gate verifies hygiene
timeline.summary: The public release gate runs and leaves no release-blocking findings.

timeline.title: Repo is pushed and released
timeline.summary: Commit 0b3dd36 lands on GitHub and v0.1.0 is published.

turning_points.title: Private skill becomes a public repo
turning_points.summary: The key transition is from local skill material to a self-contained public repository with its own README and license.

turning_points.title: Release proof becomes durable
turning_points.summary: The push and v0.1.0 release turn the work from local packaging into a public artifact.

questions.title: What makes a repository public-ready?
questions.summary: The case shows that public readiness includes README positioning, root hygiene, license, metadata, and a clean validation path.

misconceptions.title: A public release is not just git push
misconceptions.summary: The release gate and README cleanup mattered because the public first impression is part of the product surface.

resolutions.title: Gate the public surface before publishing
resolutions.summary: Run a conservative release gate, review warnings, then publish the repository and release only after blockers are gone.
